name: Missing Docstrings
description: Checks if the model catches a new Python function that lacks any docstrings.
diff:
diff --git a/math_utils.py b/math_utils.py
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/math_utils.py
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+def compute_heavy_math(x, y):
+    val = x ** 2 + y ** 2
+    return val
+

name: Undocumented Script
description: Checks if the model catches a newly added Bash script without updating AXIOMS.md or README.md.
diff:
diff --git a/scripts/run_cleanup.sh b/scripts/run_cleanup.sh
new file mode 100755
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/run_cleanup.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+echo "Starting cleanup..."
+rm -rf /tmp/cache/*
+
expectations: Update README.md or AXIOMS.md to register this script

name: Axiom Violation
description: Checks if the model flags code that violates Axiom 3 (executables must have shebangs and executable bits).
diff:
diff --git a/scripts/bad_script.sh b/scripts/bad_script.sh
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/scripts/bad_script.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+echo "Missing shebang!"
+exit 0
+
